description: Multiple claims - supported and refuted
response_text: Docker uses containerization for lightweight isolation. Docker was written in Java.
seed_content: Docker is a platform that uses OS-level containerization to deliver software in lightweight containers. Containers share the host operating system kernel, unlike virtual machines. Docker is primarily written in Go (Golang), not Java.
